title: Pigs Drop Leather
description: Pigs Now Drop Leather, And so do most other animals
body:
Pigs now drop leather, so do sheep! Every animal has a expanded loot table!

-pig

  Leather, pork, and bones

-sheep

  Leather, mutton, and bones

-cow

  Leather, beef, and bones

-Llama 

  Wool, leather, mutton, and bones

-Horse types

  Leather, mutton, and bones

-Bat

  Hide and bone meal

-Sniffer

  Leather, beef, bones, moss carpet, and Crimson roots
